ddls:
CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the software library */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the library */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Homepage of the library */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* Documentation URL of the library */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "library_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library version */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the library */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "upgrade_notes" TEXT /* Notes on upgrading to this version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_library_versions_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the software project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Project manager's name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project dependency */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library version */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dependency was installed */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the dependency is installed (e.g. dev, prod) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_dependencies_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_dependencies_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES library_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_dependencies_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the software license */,
  "license_text" TEXT /* Full text of the license */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the license information */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g. permissive, restrictive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance with the license */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance was last audited */,
  "compliance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_license_compliance_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_license_compliance_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_conflicts" (
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict */,
  "library_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first conflicting library */,
  "library_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second conflicting library */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conflict */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution steps for the conflict */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conflict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_conflicts_library_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("library_id_1") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_conflicts_library_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("library_id_2") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project dependency */,
  "new_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the new library version */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the update */,
  "urgency" TEXT /* Urgency level of the update (e.g. low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_updates_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES project_dependencies ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_updates_new_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_version_id") REFERENCES library_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_trees" (
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency tree */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "dependency_tree" TEXT /* JSON representation of the dependency tree */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the tree was last updated */,
  "tree_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the dependency tree for integrity checking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_vulnerabilities" (
  "vulnerability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vulnerability */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vulnerability */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the vulnerability */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the vulnerability was discovered */,
  "cvss_score" REAL /* CVSS score for the vulnerability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vulnerability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_vulnerabilities_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES library_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project dependency */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* JSON representation of the custom configuration */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last updated */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g. environment variable, command-line flag) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_configurations_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES project_dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "update_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update history record */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project dependency */,
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was applied */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g. success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_history_update_id FOREIGN KEY ("update_id") REFERENCES dependency_updates ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_history_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES project_dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the action */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g. insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "user" TEXT /* User who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
